name: NextStage - S.C.A.
summary: NextStage - S.C.A. is a private equity firm specializing in long term investments in medium-sized, mid cap, mature, and growth capital companies. It invests in all sectors except biotech. The firm seeks to invest in Europe. It targets 75 percent of its portfolio companies to be unlisted mid-cap companies and the remainder to be mid-cap companies listed on Euronext or Alternext. It invests between √Ç¬Ä8 million ($9.01 million) and √Ç¬Ä40 million ($45.06 million) in companies with revenue between √Ç¬Ä10 million ($11.65 million) to √Ç¬Ä500 million ($582.51 million) and enterprise value between √Ç¬Ä25 million ($28.16 million) and √Ç¬Ä200 million ($225.30 million). NextStage - S.C.A. is based in France. NextStage operates as a subsidiary of NextStage AM.
